title: Table 5 for the Study: "Correlation Study: Triggering and Magnitude of Earthquakes in Italy (≥M4.3) in Relation to the Positions and Gravitational Forces of the Sun, Moon, and Planets Relative to Earth."
author: Calandra Stefano
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Random sample extraction of 145 earthquakes.   In this short video we illustrate an example of the method used for the random sample extraction of 145 earthquakes for the Study:  "Correlation Study: Triggering and Magnitude of Earthquakes in Italy (≥M4.3) in Relation to the Positions and Gravitational Forces of the Sun, Moon, and Planets Relative to Earth"  for Section 2.10.1.
